debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro B
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨X, hX⟩
    rw [←hX]
    show val_image A X ⊆ A
    intro y ⟨x, _, hxy⟩
    rw [←hxy]
    exact x.property
  · intro hB
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro ⟨x, hx, hxy⟩
      rw [←hxy]
      exact hx
    · intro hyB
      have hyA : y ∈ A := hB hyB
      use ⟨y, hyA⟩
      exact ⟨hyB, rfl⟩
